metadata.description: A person in their 20s, presenting as male, has medium olive skin with minimal texture, and an oval face shape with a defined jawline. Their dark brown hair is pulled back into a bun, revealing a slightly receding hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and green with flecks of brown, set slightly wide apart. Thick, dark eyebrows have a gentle arch. The nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness and well-defined. A short, dark stubble covers the jawline and chin. The person has an overall appearance hinting at Mediterranean or Middle Eastern ancestry. They wear a neutral expression, looking directly at the viewer with their head held straight.
